return(function(...)local i={"\052\054\115\086\074\098\081\076\072\098\057\061";"\116\078\061\061","\057\078\061\061","\089\065\108\111\097\084\081\054\097\119\081\065\085\054\081\076","\077\050\075\077\069\090\067\098\051\120\065\081\080\087\079\056\104\108\109\108\084\054\102\121\077\088\117\109\068\079\080\097","\055\116\061\061","\115\071\117\043\074\071\115\082\104\065\066\051\067\071\115\084\067\071\115\057\104\116\061\061";"\090\116\061\061";"\088\115\117\099\070\054\067\090\068\065\105\082\116\111\048\114\115\114\061\061","\074\114\061\061";"\109\116\061\061","\106\113\065\067\122\097\115\103\088\065\048\112\099\078\080\099\115\102\113\098\071\114\043\102\109\103\074\061";"\067\121\051\085\097\068\120\079\068\084\087\119\074\065\070\122\052\107\116\061","\056\116\061\061","\056\114\061\061","\088\080\061\061","\097\121\108\100\116\086\051\105\067\097\117\065\089\117\081\048\099\090\116\061","\052\080\061\061";"\105\057\070\115\066\097\081\087\068\057\102\122\097\051\066\114\085\098\074\061";"\107\066\070\088\101\048\106\065\103\121\105\061","\082\080\061\061";"\070\054\043\120\074\057\115\085\067\097\066\047\085\086\070\068","\105\084\051\049\052\107\051\066\052\065\120\086\052\107\081\103\067\071\085\061","\116\084\106\065\067\071\074\079\099\111\122\097\067\065\081\082","\073\112\043\055\102\100\049\076\100\108\085\061";"\069\068\086\051\098\114\106\085\098\066\107\122\107\050\097\083","\066\122\070\102\097\054\122\054\070\051\066\111\099\117\117\104","\052\087\102\082\052\087\043\105\116\084\078\082\072\115\066\120\066\087\057\061";"\105\107\102\043\070\098\088\065\068\098\081\069\087\122\117\055\070\078\061\061";"\073\075\066\118","\052\090\115\100\099\054\067\084\070\117\088\071\116\084\051\090","\117\109\065\115\049\078\061\061","\103\116\061\061";"\055\120\079\047\047\116\061\061";"\121\080\061\061","\079\057\102\097\102\075\081\054\073\109\080\061","\068\097\067\079\088\054\111\120\072\065\120\048\105\057\122\082\066\080\061\061";"\088\114\061\061","\056\053\106\097\043\068\1
